title: [phase:repair] [family:post-fix-review] [provider_hint:codex] Review the modified files in /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer for remaining high-risk Stripe issues after the latest fix. Focus only on changed files and return concise findings with absolute paths.
summary_text: 1. Critical: [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts:8`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts#L8) and [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/customer-portal/index.ts:5`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/customer-portal/index.ts#L5) import `validateRedirectUrl`, but that symbol is not exported from the shared validation module. Result: the checkout and portal Edge Functions can fail to initialize/bundle, making billing entry points unavailable. 2. High: [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts:185`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts#L185) now hard-fails through [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts:38`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts#L38) for any subscription `priceId` not in the current env-configured allowlist. Legacy, grandfathered, or rotated Stripe prices will cause `customer.subscription.*` webhooks to return 500 and retry indefinitely, leaving subscription state out of sync. No other remaining high-risk Stripe issues stood out in the changed Stripe files.
